reasoning: Systematic authoritarian consolidation: Mali withdrew from ECOWAS (Jan 29) specifically to avoid democratic pressure, April consultations recommended dissolving parties AND extending Goïta's term 5 years, decree forbids ALL party member meetings, and this follows a pattern with Niger/Burkina Faso. International leverage is minimal (AU already suspended, ECOWAS exited) and the junta has demonstrated willingness to bear costs to maintain power. While UN has condemned the decree and protests occurred before it, the junta's pattern is to double down on suppression. No evidence of internal junta divisions or external pressure sufficient to force reversal within 6 weeks.
